info.title: Patreon Clone API
info.description: API dokumentacija za platformu za podršku kreatorima

get.description: Requires role: admin. Supports filters: tip, role, per_page.

put.summary: Update user role or tip (admin only)

delete.description: Requires role: admin. Cannot delete yourself.

get.description: List all creators with their users.

put.description: Admin can edit any creator's page name or description.

post.description: Autentifikacija korisnika i vraćanje API tokena.
Briše trenutni API token, čime se korisnik odjavljuje.

put.description: Samo kreator može ažurirati sopstveni profil.

get.description: Display a listing of public posts for a specific creator.
Display the specified post if it is public.

404.description: Not subscribed or creator not found

get.description: Show a single subscription (only if it belongs to the user).

422.description: Tier does not belong to creator

get.summary: List tiers (subscription levels) of a creator
get.description: Display a listing of tiers for a specific creator.

get.summary: Get earnings for the authenticated creator
get.description: Get earnings for the authenticated creator.

post.summary: Upgrade a patron account to creator (oba)
